title: "Pix By The Numbers" report released, July 2023
excerpt: Matera's latest "Pix By The Numbers" has been released, showing that Pix poses a challenge to credit cards.
body: Matera's latest "Pix By The Numbers" has been released, showing that Pix poses a challenge to credit cards. Read the report [here](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20230725094936/en/5492814/Credit-Card-Transactions-in-Brazil-May-Have-Peaked-as-Pix-Continues-to-Surge).
